stemHtml: The pilot decides to increase V2. Does this have any effect on the 35 ft screen height?

options.a: The distance from the beginning of the take-off roll to the location of the screen height will be shorter.
options.b: The 35 ft screen height is located further down along the runway.
options.c: The screen height and the location of the screen height along the runway will not change.
options.d: The screen height will be increased to 50 ft.
